title: The plants on my balcony
summary: Describe the plants on your balcony and how you take care of them.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about the plants on your balcony. Describe what they look like, name them if you know, and explain how you care for them. Use present simple.
sampleText: On my balcony in my apartment in Athens, I have five pots of plants. Three of them are herbs: basil, mint, and rosemary. The other two are small flowers with yellow petals. The herbs grow quickly and they smell very good. I use the basil and mint in my cooking every week. In the morning, I check the soil with my finger. If the soil is dry, I water the plants. I water them about three times a week in summer because it is very hot. In winter, I water them only once a week. The flower pots sit near the balcony railing where they get the most sunlight. Sometimes the leaves turn yellow and I trim the dead parts. I put the pots on a wooden shelf so they are all at the same height. My neighbors say my balcony looks very green and nice. I feel calm when I stand there in the morning and look at the plants. Taking care of them is my small hobby.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: check the soil with my finger
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: kiểm tra đất bằng ngón tay

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for routines
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng thì hiện tại đơn để miêu tả việc làm thường xuyên: 'I water them three times a week', 'I check the soil every morning'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the present simple for repeated actions: 'I water them about three times a week in summer'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Conditional with 'if' at A1
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Câu điều kiện đơn giản: 'If the soil is dry, I water the plants.' — dùng hiện tại đơn ở cả hai vế.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: A simple conditional uses present simple in both clauses: 'If the soil is dry, I water the plants'.

sampleTranslationVi: Trên ban công của căn hộ ở Athens, tôi có năm chậu cây. Ba trong số đó là rau thơm: húng quế, bạc hà và hương thảo. Hai chậu còn lại là những bông hoa nhỏ với cánh hoa vàng. Các loại rau thơm phát triển nhanh và có mùi rất thơm. Tôi dùng húng quế và bạc hà trong nấu ăn mỗi tuần. Vào buổi sáng, tôi kiểm tra đất bằng ngón tay. Nếu đất khô, tôi tưới cây. Tôi tưới khoảng ba lần mỗi tuần vào mùa hè vì trời rất nóng. Vào mùa đông, tôi chỉ tưới một lần mỗi tuần. Các chậu hoa đặt gần lan can ban công để nhận được ánh nắng nhiều nhất. Đôi khi lá chuyển sang màu vàng và tôi cắt bỏ phần chết. Tôi đặt các chậu trên một kệ gỗ để chúng đều ở cùng một độ cao. Hàng xóm nói ban công của tôi trông rất xanh và đẹp. Tôi cảm thấy bình yên khi đứng ở đó vào buổi sáng và nhìn các cây. Chăm sóc chúng là sở thích nhỏ của tôi.

mcQuestions.prompt: How many pots of plants are on the balcony?
mcQuestions.hint: The first sentence tells you the number.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which herbs does the writer grow?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'basil, mint, and rosemary' are named in the text.
mcQuestions.hint: Three herbs are listed in one sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: How often does the writer water the plants in summer?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I water them about three times a week in summer'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the summer watering frequency.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why do the flower pots sit near the railing?
options: Because they get the most sunlight there.
Because the shelf is too small.
Because the herbs need more space.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'The flower pots sit near the balcony railing where they get the most sunlight'.

mcQuestions.prompt: How does the writer check if the plants need water?
options: They check the soil with a finger.
They pour water every morning no matter what.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I check the soil with my finger'.

options: The herbs is growing quickly every day.
mcQuestions.explanation: Plural subject 'herbs' takes the base form 'grow'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do when leaves turn yellow?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'Sometimes the leaves turn yellow and I trim the dead parts'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word means to cut plants to keep them tidy?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'trim' means to cut away small unwanted parts.

mcQuestions.prompt: How does the writer feel on the balcony in the morning?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I feel calm when I stand there in the morning'.
mcQuestions.hint: The last two sentences describe the feeling.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word is the correct plural of 'leaf'?
Which sentence gives a reason using 'because'?
options: I water them in summer because it is very hot.
I water them in summer it is very hot.
I water them in summer so hot.
I water them in summer, hot because.
mcQuestions.hint: 'because' links a reason to an action.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do some city people choose to grow plants on small balconies instead of in a garden?
